title: Parent to Parent Networking * Fathers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > Parent to Parent Networking * Fathers 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Autism Spectrum Disorder Disabilities Issues Fathers Foster Parents Perinatal Depression Substance Use Disorder Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF IMPACT NW IMPACT NW BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER EARLY CHILDHOOD FATHERING PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects fathers with their children, other fathers, and the community through weekly father-child interaction groups and monthly outings designed to increase confidence and skills as fathers and father figures. All services are provided by fathers. 7211 SE 62nd Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Fathers and father figures with children under age 5 Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 421-0933 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMPACT NW EARLY CHILDHOOD FATHERING PROJECT
